sourcesContent:
/** Wilayas 01–58 (codes align with Jeunes Toys / Algeria admin divisions). */

/** Example communes per wilaya (demo subset; extend as needed). */
export const COMMUNES_BY_WILAYA = {
  "16": ["Alger Centre", "Bab El Oued", "Hydra", "Kouba", "Dar El Beïda"],
  "31": ["Oran", "Bir El Djir", "Es Sénia", "Arzew"],
